ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_chr" TEXT /* Chromosome of the gene */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Type of gene */,
  "transcript_ids" TEXT /* List of transcript IDs associated with the gene */,
  "protein_ids" TEXT /* List of protein IDs associated with the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gene's function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chr_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chr_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  "centromere_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the centromere */,
  "centromere_end" INTEGER /* End position of the centromere */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the chromosome */,
  "cytoband" TEXT /* Cytogenetic band of the chromosome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the genetic variant */,
  "trait" TEXT /* Trait or disease associated with the variant */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the association */,
  "odds_ratio" REAL /* Odds ratio of the association */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the association */,
  "z_squared" REAL /* Z-score squared of the association */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study that reported the association */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the association */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the publication where the association was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_associations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_associations_trait FOREIGN KEY ("trait") REFERENCES traits ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait or disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trait or disease */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the trait */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the trait in the population */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* Known risk factors for the trait */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Available treatment options for the trait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the genetic variant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the variant */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the study was published */,
  "researchers" TEXT /* Researchers involved in the study */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the study was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the study */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Funding sources for the study */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_variants" (
  "study_variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-variant association */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the genetic variant */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to analyze the variant in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_variants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the external database */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the external database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external database */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for accessing the database */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_variants" (
  "database_variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database-variant association */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external database */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the genetic variant */,
  "variant_accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the variant in the external database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_variants_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES external_databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the genetic variant visualized */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., Manhattan plot, QQ plot) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the visualization image */,
  "tool_used" TEXT /* Tool used to create the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
